name: director-youtube
description: Provides YouTube Live Chat integration for communication and context.
aiContext:
The YouTube extension posts messages to the live stream chat.
- communication.talkToChat: posts a message to the active YouTube Live Chat. Use for race updates, incident callouts, and viewer engagement during key moments.

intents.title: Send Chat Message
intents.description: Sends a message to the active YouTube Live Chat. Use for race updates, incident callouts, and viewer engagement during key race moments.

intents.title: Start Chat Monitoring
intents.description: Begins polling YouTube API for chat messages.

commands.title: Sign in to YouTube
commands.description: Starts the OAuth flow for YouTube.

events.title: Chat Message Received
events.description: Emitted when a new chat message is detected in the stream.

youtube.channelId.description: The YouTube Channel ID to monitor.
